pubspec.name: mlx_localllm
pubspec.description: A high-performance local LLM plugin for macOS using Apple's MLX framework.

sections.title: Provide documentation
sections.summary:
### [*] 10/10 points: 20% or more of the public API has dartdoc comments

14 out of 37 API elements (37.8 %) have documentation comments.

Some symbols that are missing documentation: `mlx_localllm`, `mlx_localllm.DownloadProgress`, `mlx_localllm.DownloadProgress.DownloadProgress.new`, `mlx_localllm.DownloadProgress.error`, `mlx_localllm.DownloadProgress.isDone`.

### [*] 10/10 points: Package has an example

sections.title: Platform support
sections.summary:
### [*] 20/20 points: Supports 2 of 6 possible platforms (**iOS**, Android, Web, Windows, **macOS**, Linux)

* âś“ iOS

* âś“ macOS


These platforms are not supported:

<details>
<summary>
Package does not support platform `Android`.
</summary>

Because:
* `package:mlx_localllm/mlx_localllm.dart` that declares support for platforms: `iOS`, `macOS`.
</details>

<details>
<summary>
Package does not support platform `Windows`.
</summary>

Because:
* `package:mlx_localllm/mlx_localllm.dart` that declares support for platforms: `iOS`, `macOS`.
</details>

<details>
<summary>
Package does not support platform `Linux`.
</summary>

Because:
* `package:mlx_localllm/mlx_localllm.dart` that declares support for platforms: `iOS`, `macOS`.
</details>

<details>
<summary>
Package does not support platform `Web`.
</summary>

Because:
* `package:mlx_localllm/mlx_localllm.dart` that declares support for platforms: `iOS`, `macOS`.
</details>


**Swift PM-ready:** This iOS or macOS plugin supports the Swift Package Manager. See https://docs.flutter.dev/to/spm for details.
